stations.name: Hemmant railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closest station for parts of Tingalpa.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Tingalpa via Wynnum Road and New Cleveland Road.

driving.motorway_access: Direct Gateway Motorway access. Wynnum Road for inner CBD travel.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 14 to 18 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.
driving.airport_access_note: Brisbane Airport approximately 12 to 15 minutes off-peak via Gateway.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Tingalpa has retail and casual dining at the Wynnum Road and New Cleveland Road precincts. The Cannon Hill K-Mart Plaza and the Carindale shopping centre are both within a short drive for big-format retail.

pockets.name: Western residential
pockets.character: Streets closer to Cannon Hill. Residential character, post-war and contemporary stock.

pockets.name: Central Tingalpa
pockets.character: Larger residential streets, established family-home stock, accessible entry point into the inner east.

pockets.name: Industrial-adjacent
pockets.character: Streets bordering the New Cleveland Road and Tingalpa light industrial corridor. Market prices the adjacency accurately.

buyer_profile.note: Tingalpa is one of the most accessible entry points into the inner east corridor.
Buyers priced out of Cannon Hill, Morningside, or Bulimba who want similar transport access at a more accessible price level.
Motorway access and rental demand from the broader inner-east corridor support yield numbers that work for investor buyers.
